title: carex × helvola
intro: Carex × helvola, also known as the hybrid sedge, is a type of ornamental grass that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The Carex × helvola plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Carex × helvola can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
